LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT DANIEL KIFOR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CODE CIV. PROC. SECTION 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. COUNSEL BRIAN BROPHY'S DECLARATION INDICATES THIS DID NOT OCCUR. ALL COUNSEL ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH CODE CIV. PROC. SEC. 430.41. DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY DECEMBER 2, 2021. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's demurrer to the complaint is sustained without leave to amend because plaintiff fails to state a cause of action. (See Code Civ. Proc. 430.10(e).)

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2021 Continued To Dec-22-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-02-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DANIEL KIFOR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Code Civ. Proc. section 430.41, which requires counsel to meet and confer in person or by telephone before a demurrer is filed. Counsel Brian Brophy's declaration indicates this did not occur. All counsel are ordered to comply with Code Civ. Proc. sec. 430.41. Defendants' response to the complaint is now due by December 2, 2021.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
